title: Encyclia pollardiana
taxonomy: Encyclia pollardiana is a species of orchid, and it belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family is further divided into subfamilies, with Encyclia pollardiana belonging to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Encyclia is also part of the subtribe Laeliinae, which comprises many species of orchids. The subtribe Laeliinae is a subgroup of the tribe Epidendreae, making Encyclia pollardiana a member of the larger Orchidaceae family. At the kingdom level, Encyclia pollardiana is classified as Plantae.
uses: Encyclia pollardiana is a species of orchid that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. Research has shown that the plant contains compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities.
